back_translation: Because every high priest who is chosen from among humans is appointed for humans in matters relating to God, in order to offer gift-offerings and sacrifices for sins
The one who is able to deal gently with foolish people and those who go astray, because he himself is enveloped in weakness
For this reason, he must offer sacrifices for the sins of himself, just as he offers for the people
And no one takes this honor by himself, but the one whom God calls, just as God called Aaron
In the same way, Christ also did not exalt Himself to become a high priest, but the One who said to the Son, ‘You are my Son, today I have begotten you’
And in another passage God says, ‘You are a priest forever, in the order of Melchizedek’
In the days of his flesh, He offered up prayers and supplications, to the One who was able to save Him from death, with a loud cry and with tears, and He was heard because of reverent-fear
Although He was the Son, He learned obedience from what He had suffered
And when He had attained perfection, He became the source of eternal salvation for all who obey Him
God formally proclaimed His name as high priest in the order of Melchizedek
We have many things to say about this matter, and it is hard to explain, because you all have become dull-of-hearing

Because by this time, you all should have been able to be teachers, but you still need others to teach you the basic principles of the word of God again. And you have become those who need milk, not solid food
Because everyone who still drinks milk has no experience in the message of righteousness, because he is still an infant
But solid food is for adults, those who through habit have trained their senses to distinguish between good and evil
